narrative: Financial: 3 years audited financials clean. Quality of earnings confirmed EBITDA $12M (vs reported $12.4M, minor add-back disagreement). Working capital target $2.1M. Legal: corporate organization clean, all material contracts assignable. IP: 8 patents, 14 trademarks, clean assignment, no open litigation, OSS compliance verified (Apache/MIT/BSD permissive only). Customer: largest customer 8%, top-5 customers 22%, all contracts assignable. HR: key persons under retention agreements, accrued PTO $180K on balance sheet, WARN compliant. Tax: NOL $4M, §382 study completed.
